/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -fno-omit-frame-pointer -pg -g -O2 -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -pg CMakeFiles/raftCoreRun.dir/raftKvDB.cpp.o -o /home/kai/KVstorageBaseRaft-cpp/bin/raftCoreRun   -L/home/kai/KVstorageBaseRaft-cpp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kai/KVstorageBaseRaft-cpp/lib /home/kai/KVstorageBaseRaft-cpp/lib/libskip_list_on_raft.a /home/kai/KVstorageBaseRaft-cpp/lib/librpc_lib.a -lprotobuf -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lpthread -ldl -lboost_serialization
